title: Olsynium trinerve
taxonomy: Olsynium trinerve is a species of flowering plant in the family Iridaceae. It is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The classification of Olsynium trinerve can be broken down into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Angiospermophyta), class (Liliopsida), order (Asparagales), family (Iridaceae), genus (Olsynium), and species (O. trinerve). The plant belongs to the subfamily Iridoideae and tribe Sisyrinchieae. Olsynium trinerve is closely related to other species in the Olsynium genus, which are also known as California iris.
